response.original_title: Playboy Playmate of the Year 2008 & 2009 Party Special
response.overview: Cameras go behind the scenes at the awards party for the "Playmate of the Year"-an honor bestowed upon one of the stunning Playmates who grace the pages of the internationally renowned men's magazine, PLAYBOY.
response.title: Playboy Playmate of the Year 2008 & 2009 Party Special
